title: arctotis auriculata
intro: Arctotis auriculata, also known as the Cape marguerite or gold of pride, is a flowering plant species native to southern Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Arctotis auriculata include its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds, as well as its potential to treat respiratory issues and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions or decoctions, and it is also used in combination with other herbs to create topical creams and ointments.
